title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
